description: This change refactors ISR cache invalidation to reduce stale responses under burst traffic. We add a bounded retry with jitter and document trade-offs for edge vs node runtimes.
humanNotes: Detailed ISR cache behavior explanation with trade-offs

description: Introduces stricter request context teardown to prevent leaked references in async test clients. Includes migration notes for extensions that hook teardown signals.

description: Splits concurrent rendering work into smaller lanes for transitions. Benchmarks show improved input responsiveness on large lists without regressing hydration time.

description: Adds queryset prefetch guard for polymorphic relations to avoid N+1 queries in admin list views. Includes before/after query counts in test notes.
